step_runner.py:115 — `fn_name: str(step.fn) if step.fn is not None else 'None'`. Test G5 confirms PASS with fn_name='<function _fn at 0x...>'.

judge_notes: All 5 goals met. Agent implemented _write_executor_info in step_runner.py matching the oracle approach almost exactly. All 5 test gates (G1-G5) pass. Score = 0.30 + 0.10 + 0.25 + 0.20 + 0.15 = 1.00.
